A '''Gungan scout''' used [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Farseein/Legends|farseein]] to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] the [[Great Grass Plains/Legends|Great Grass Plains]] for reinforcements from the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the occupation of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="TPM" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="TEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> He was sitting on an [[Elders (Naboo)/Legends|Elder]] statue at the edges of the [[Gallo Mountains/Legends|Gallo Mountains]] and the [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Lianorm Swamp]] when he alerted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. He also rode a [[Kaadu/Legends|Kaadu]].<ref name="TPM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Gungan was voiced by [[Peter Serafinowicz]]<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|117|My Star Wars|My ''Star Wars'': Peter Serafinowicz}}</ref> in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace]].<ref name="TPM" />
